localized_texts.text: Berjaya Times Square Theme Park

Experience endless fun and excitement at Berjaya Times Square Theme Park, a world-class indoor amusement park located within one of Kuala Lumpur’s largest shopping malls. Enjoy adrenaline-pumping rides like the Supersonic Odyssey suspended roller coaster and thrilling Go-Kart racing, alongside family-friendly attractions in the Kids’ Zone with colorful rides and safe play areas.The Experience Pass offers unlimited access to rides and attractions, plus entertainment in the arcade filled with games for all ages. With flexible single- or multi-day passes, dining options, and shopping just steps away, it’s the perfect destination for thrill-seekers, families, and friends looking for an action-packed day indoors.
Experience heart-pounding excitement with a variety of thrilling rides at Berjaya Times Square Theme Park.
Challenge your friends and family to a thrilling race on our exhilarating Go-Kart track, where speed and skill will determine the victor.
For the younger ones, the Kids' Zone offers a magical and enchanting experience.
Step into our Arcade section and discover a world of entertainment and gaming.

Experience heart-racing attractions like Supersonic Odyssey, a suspended roller coaster with twists, turns, and high-speed excitement, plus an exhilarating Go-Kart track for friendly competition.Younger visitors can enjoy the dedicated Kids’ Zone, including the charming Fantasy Garden with colorful rides, interactive play areas, and a safe, magical environment designed just for them.Step into the Arcade for skill-based games, shooting galleries, and the latest video game experiences—perfect for all ages.Enjoy unlimited rides and attractions with flexible ticket options, including single-day and multi-day passes, so you can make the most of your visit.Located inside Berjaya Times Square shopping mall, the park offers easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment—ideal for taking breaks between thrills.
The theme park offers varying levels of accessibility for guests with disabilities.
Some rides at Berjaya Times Square Theme Park have minimum height requirements for safety reasons.
Pregnant women are generally advised to avoid rides with intense movements or sudden drops.
Wear light, breathable clothing and comfortable closed-toe shoes or sneakers, as you’ll be walking a lot and enjoying fast-paced rides and attractions.
Avoid loose accessories, dangling jewelry, slippers, or high heels to ensure safety and comfort while participating in rides and activities.
What’s included: Admission to: Berjaya Times Square Theme Park & Amusement Rides

What’s included: Rides included: Supersonic Odyssey Roller Coaster, Robo Crash, Honey Bump, Molly-Cool’s Swing, Crazy Bus, Botanic Drive, Flying Bumble Bee, Buddy Go Round, Fantasy Trail, Dizzy Izzy, Spinning Orbit, Ooorts’ Express
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is valid for Malaysian Ticket is valid for one-time entry only. A valid ticket must be presented to gain admission. Entry is only permitted within the validity period stated on the ticket. Entry will not be allowed for tickets that are invalid, redeemed, collected, consumed, lost, or expired. Tickets will not be replaced and no refund will be provided. The attraction reserves the right to request personal identification or proof of nationality before granting admission. Access may be denied if ticket conditions of sale have not been met.Eligibility Child below 3 years old or below 90 cm in height is free of charge. A surcharge of RM 20.00 (Adult) or RM 16.00 (Child) will be imposed on customers who fail to present their Malaysian Identity Card (MyKad/MyKid) during redemption of Malaysian ticket category. The attraction reserves the right to determine Child, Infant, Youth, Senior, or Adult ticket age range and may request proof of age before admission.Attraction Access Height, weight, size, and age restrictions and medical warnings apply to certain rides and attractions. These are displayed at each ride and available at Guest Services. The attraction reserves the right to change operating days, hours, and last admission times without prior notice. The attraction may temporarily or permanently close rides, events, or facilities for maintenance, safety, operational reasons, force majeure, special events, or private functions. No ticket replacement or refund will be granted under these circumstances.Additional Information No jewelry or valuable items are allowed to be worn or brought during activities. This activity is not recommended for individuals with medical conditions (e.g., high blood pressure, epilepsy), pregnant women, or seniors. Due to the nature of the activity, it is not recommended for persons with impaired physical mobility or wheelchair users.Important Notes Please ensure all admission, eligibility, and attraction access requirements above are reviewed prior to your visit. Plan your visit in advance and check the official website for the latest operating hours before arrival.
Cancellation Policy: Free cancellation till validity ends.
